# uapi_firewall_defaults (Data Source)

The global firewall defaults (uci firewall.defaults).

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "uapi_firewall_defaults" "this" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `drop_invalid` (Boolean) Whether packets in an invalid conntrack state are dropped.
- `flow_offloading` (Boolean) Whether software flow offloading is enabled.
- `flow_offloading_hw` (Boolean) Whether hardware flow offloading is enabled.
- `forward` (String) Default policy for forwarded traffic: ACCEPT, REJECT, or DROP.
- `id` (String) Stable id of the defaults section.
- `input` (String) Default policy for input traffic: ACCEPT, REJECT, or DROP.
- `managed` (Boolean) Whether the underlying uci section is uapi-managed.
- `output` (String) Default policy for output traffic: ACCEPT, REJECT, or DROP.
- `syn_flood` (Boolean) Whether SYN-flood protection is enabled.
- `synflood_burst` (String) SYN-flood burst limit.
- `synflood_rate` (String) SYN-flood rate limit.
- `tcp_syncookies` (Boolean) Whether TCP SYN cookies are enabled.
